episode_name: Referendum violence campaign in East Timor
theater_description: Direct-killing phase of militia and Indonesian security-force violence around the East Timor referendum, from early January through late October 1999.
geometry_method_note: Territory-wide episode because militia and security-force violence, displacement, and scorched-earth activity were not confined to a single city or district.
military_area_note: Security-force presence is sourceable, but combatant-victim deaths are not comparably sourceable for a DR path.
civilian_area_note: Civilian victims are the analytically central population; displacement and forced relocation were widespread throughout the territory.
split_reason: This is the bounded 1999 referendum violence window rather than the entire Indonesian occupation.
quality_note: Civilian direct-death range is comparatively strong thanks to commission/expert work, but combatant-victim deaths and comparable denominators are too weak for full DR publication.
